_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular analyses refine classification of gliomas arising in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Of the four patients with NF1-associated gliomas belonging to the molecular high-grade group, three demonstrated glioma progression during treatment with MEK inhibitor as a single agent. The fourth patient experienced stable disease
details: Of 4 patients with molecular high-grade NF1-associated gliomas, 3 demonstrated glioma progression during treatment with trametinib as single agent, 1 experienced stable disease when combined with everolimus
